productText:
000
FZUS56 KEKA 171603
CWFEKA

Coastal Waters Forecast for Northwest California
National Weather Service Eureka CA
903 AM PDT Sun May 17 2026

WATERS FROM PT ST GEORGE TO PT ARENA AND OUT 60 NM

PZZ400-180515-
903 AM PDT Sun May 17 2026

.SYNOPSIS FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA WATERS...Near gale to gale force
northerly winds are expected to continue into early this week.
Tonight and Monday the stronger winds push slightly farther off
the coast, although there may be brief threat for gales in
afternoon and evening. Near gale to Gale northerly winds and 
large, steep seas will likely continue through much of the 
upcoming workweek.

$$
